name: Integration Brief & Auth Decision Record Generator
when_to_use: Строит integration_brief и auth_decision_record: provider, endpoints, scopes, redirect URIs, callback URLs, rate limits, error model, test strategy, go-live checklist и rollback plan.
Seed rationale: Это главный артефакт, который разделяет discovery/gating и собственно кодовую реализацию.
inputs: Должен выпускать два связанных артефакта: 1) integration_brief для delivery; 2) auth_decision_record с rationale и boundary rules. Включать non-goals, security assumptions, ownership, environments, observability expectations и explicit list of human-gated console actions.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
Do not request, paste, persist, or summarize raw secrets, tokens, browser session dumps, or vendor-console exports.
Do not move credential truth into prompt bundles, context packs, repo docs, or Linear comments.
Do not collapse the metadata plane and credential plane into one artifact or one instruction surface.

human_gate.notes: Integration-sensitive skill: human approval remains mandatory around consent, credentials, and go-live.

description: Строит integration_brief и auth_decision_record: provider, endpoints, scopes, redirect URIs, callback URLs, rate limits, error model, test strategy, go-live checklist и rollback plan.
why: Это главный артефакт, который разделяет discovery/gating и собственно кодовую реализацию.
build_spec: Должен выпускать два связанных артефакта: 1) integration_brief для delivery; 2) auth_decision_record с rationale и boundary rules. Включать non-goals, security assumptions, ownership, environments, observability expectations и explicit list of human-gated console actions.
